card_description: Louis Bolono is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick synthesizes his findings into a five-point summary of Gnosticism, framing it as a "saving revelation" about our status as slaves in a Black Iron Prison of determinism."
